title: Globule
description: Adds a new item called the Honey Globule that can be crafted into slimeballs for peaceful mode players.
body:
### This pack is **incompatible** with any other pack that uses the knowledge book. Based on how this pack is designed, it will interfere with other datapacks that use this.
### 
### Also, the resource pack is a seperate file you'll need to download. You **MUST** use this resource pack.

This pack was designed as a help to peaceful mode players (like me) who still want to make flying machines and sticky pistons. The crafting recipe for the honey globule is:

A plus shape of honeycombs, with a honey block in the center. This makes 16 globules.
The recipe to craft a slimeball is to just put a honey globule in the center of the crafting grid.

This pack doesn't have to be for peaceful players only, but people who don't enjoy slime farms or prefer this recipe can use it as well.

Questions? Email me at quantumsoldship@icloud.com
